question: Aiava vs. Dart: Set 1 Games O/U 9.5

This market refers on the tennis match between Hanyu Guo and Dominika Salkova in the Australian Open, Qualification WTA, scheduled for January 12 at 6:00PM ET.

This market will resolve to 'Guo' if Hanyu Guo advances against Dominika Salkova.

This market will resolve to 'Salkova' if Dominika Salkova advances against Hanyu Guo.

If the match is canceled (not played at all), ends in a tie, or is delayed beyond 7 days from the scheduled date without a winner determined, this market will resolve to 50-50.

If the match ends in a walkover (player withdraws before the start and the other advances automatically), this market will resolve to 50-50.

The primary resolution source will be official information from the Australian Open. A consensus of credible reporting may also be used.

This market refers on the tennis match between Tomas Barrios and Sascha Gueymard-Wayenburg in the Australian Open, Qualification ATP, scheduled for January 12 at 6:00PM ET.

This market will resolve to 'Barrios' if Tomas Barrios advances against Sascha Gueymard-Wayenburg.

This market will resolve to 'Gueymard-Wayenburg' if Sascha Gueymard-Wayenburg advances against Tomas Barrios.

If the match is canceled (not played at all), ends in a tie, or is delayed beyond 7 days from the scheduled date without a winner determined, this market will resolve to 50-50.

If the match begins but is not completed, and one player advances due to the opponent's retirement, default, or disqualification, this market will resolve to the player who advances.

If the match ends in a walkover (player withdraws before the start and the other advances automatically), this market will resolve to 50-50.

The primary resolution source will be official information from the Australian Open. A consensus of credible reporting may also be used.

question: Set 1 Winner: Barrios vs Gueymard-Wayenburg

If the match begins but is not completed, and the first set is concluded with a winner determined, this market will resolve based on that completed set. If the first set is not completed for any reason, this market will resolve 50-50.
If the match is canceled (not played at all) or is delayed beyond 7 days from the scheduled date without play beginning, this market will resolve 50-50.
Resolution will be based on official Grand Slam match statistics.

This market refers to the tennis match between Alana Subasic and Lola Radivojevic in the Australian Open, Qualification WTA, scheduled for January 12 2026.
This market will resolve to "Over" if the total number of games completed across all sets equals or exceeds 22. Otherwise, it will resolve to "Under."
All tiebreaks—including any Champions/Super tiebreak—count as one (1) game toward the total.
If the match begins but is not completed, this market will resolve 50-50. If the match is canceled before play begins or delayed beyond 7 days from the scheduled date without a result, this market will also resolve 50-50.
Resolution will be based on official Grand Slam statistics.
groupItemTitle: Australian Open Women's: Alana Subasic vs Lola Radivojevic Match O/U 21.5

events.title: Australian Open Women's: Alana Subasic vs Lola Radivojevic
events.description:
This market refers on the tennis match between Alana Subasic and Lola Radivojevic in the Australian Open, Qualification WTA, scheduled for January 12 at 6:00PM ET.

This market will resolve to 'Subasic' if Alana Subasic advances against Lola Radivojevic.

This market will resolve to 'Radivojevic' if Lola Radivojevic advances against Alana Subasic.

If the match is canceled (not played at all), ends in a tie, or is delayed beyond 7 days from the scheduled date without a winner determined, this market will resolve to 50-50.

If the match begins but is not completed, and one player advances due to the opponent's retirement, default, or disqualification, this market will resolve to the player who advances.

If the match ends in a walkover (player withdraws before the start and the other advances automatically), this market will resolve to 50-50.

The primary resolution source will be official information from the Australian Open. A consensus of credible reporting may also be used.

This market refers to the tennis match between Maddison Inglis and Leyre Romero Gormaz in the Australian Open, Qualification WTA, scheduled for January 12 2026.
This market will resolve to "Over" if the total number of games completed across all sets equals or exceeds 22. Otherwise, it will resolve to "Under."
All tiebreaks—including any Champions/Super tiebreak—count as one (1) game toward the total.
If the match begins but is not completed, this market will resolve 50-50. If the match is canceled before play begins or delayed beyond 7 days from the scheduled date without a result, this market will also resolve 50-50.
Resolution will be based on official Grand Slam statistics.
groupItemTitle: Australian Open Women's: Maddison Inglis vs Leyre Romero Gormaz Match O/U 21.5

events.title: Australian Open Women's: Maddison Inglis vs Leyre Romero Gormaz
events.description:
This market refers on the tennis match between Maddison Inglis and Leyre Romero Gormaz in the Australian Open, Qualification WTA, scheduled for January 12 at 6:00PM ET.

This market will resolve to 'Inglis' if Maddison Inglis advances against Leyre Romero Gormaz.

This market will resolve to 'Gormaz' if Leyre Romero Gormaz advances against Maddison Inglis.

If the match is canceled (not played at all), ends in a tie, or is delayed beyond 7 days from the scheduled date without a winner determined, this market will resolve to 50-50.

If the match begins but is not completed, and one player advances due to the opponent's retirement, default, or disqualification, this market will resolve to the player who advances.

If the match ends in a walkover (player withdraws before the start and the other advances automatically), this market will resolve to 50-50.

The primary resolution source will be official information from the Australian Open. A consensus of credible reporting may also be used.

This market refers on the tennis match between Storm Hunter and Ekaterine Gorgodze in the Australian Open, Qualification WTA, scheduled for January 12 at 6:00PM ET.

This market will resolve to 'Hunter' if Storm Hunter advances against Ekaterine Gorgodze.

This market will resolve to 'Gorgodze' if Ekaterine Gorgodze advances against Storm Hunter.

If the match is canceled (not played at all), ends in a tie, or is delayed beyond 7 days from the scheduled date without a winner determined, this market will resolve to 50-50.

If the match begins but is not completed, and one player advances due to the opponent's retirement, default, or disqualification, this market will resolve to the player who advances.

If the match ends in a walkover (player withdraws before the start and the other advances automatically), this market will resolve to 50-50.

The primary resolution source will be official information from the Australian Open. A consensus of credible reporting may also be used.

question: Vandewinkel vs. Lee: Total Sets O/U 2.5
description:
